    filesystems/wimlib: Update 1.13.0 → 1.14.4

    Improve port:
     - PORTVERSION → DISTVERSION;
     - remove GNU_CONFIGURE_MANPREFIX;
     - remove unnecessary dependencies from libxml2 ad fuse;
     - pet portclippy;
     - add INSTALL_TARGET=install-strip.

    PR:     284111
